overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a futuristic cyberpunk-style city, showing a busy multi-lane street with continuous vehicle traffic. The camera is positioned on an elevated walkway overlooking the road, with distinctive orange structural pillars in the foreground and futuristic glass skyscrapers visible in the background under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban arterial road with elevated pedestrian walkway

events.description: pedestrian enters the crosswalk from the right side and begins crossing the multi-lane street
pedestrian completes crossing and exits the crosswalk on the left side

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on an elevated walkway, observing the traffic flow below

notable_agents.action: crossing the street from right to left across the yellow-striped crosswalk
black sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large orange support beam dominating the right foreground of the frame
illuminated billboard displaying advertisements on the left side of the walkway
metal railing along the pedestrian walkway where the camera is positioned
cluster of tall futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades in the background
tropical palm trees lining the median between road lanes
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: A stationary view from an elevated walkway overlooking a busy futuristic city street. The scene is dominated by a large orange structural pillar in the foreground and a backdrop of glass skyscrapers under an overcast sky. Continuous moderate traffic flows through the multi-lane road below, while a single pedestrian crosses the street via the yellow-striped crosswalk midway through the clip. Palm trees and digital billboards add to the cyberpunk urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary, elevated perspective over a bustling cyberpunk metropolis under a heavy, overcast sky. It begins with a view framed by a massive orange structural pillar in the foreground, overlooking a multi-lane road where a steady stream of futuristic vehicles flows through the city. As the traffic continues its rhythmic movement, the scene shifts focus to a single pedestrian crossing the street via a yellow-striped crosswalk. The urban landscape then expands to reveal digital billboards and palm trees that line the thoroughfare, all set against a backdrop of towering glass skyscrapers.
